items.title: CSV to Markdown table module
items.author: /u/longphd
items.content:
• Caption for table (HTML comment)
  • Compact layout (no spaces between pipes and cell value)
  • Custom delimiter, comments allow
  • Ability to exclude columns

Code criticisms welcomed, do roast my GitHub repo. I'll be happy to have suggestions/feature requests as well.

submitted by /u/longphd

items.title: Reverse Engineering SQLite in Go
items.author: /u/furrypurpledinosaur
items.content: I have been working on reverse engineering SQLite in Go. Not exactly as I am borrowing some features from other databases so it is not a 1 to 1 exact replica but the main idea is the same and I have been keeping it as close as possible. A simple embedded single file database. It's an ongoing effort but I wanted to share what I have done so far after over a year.
